title: Hi, I’m Cole deMoet
text:
I’m a 3rd year focused on using data, storytelling, and digital tools to help organizations understand customers and improve marketing performance.
My interests include campaign analytics, dashboard design, SEO, customer segmentation, and strategic marketing communication. This portfolio is designed for prospective employers, recruiters, and collaborators looking for evidence of technical skill, business judgment, and professional communication.
View My Projects See Dashboard

title: Hi, I’m Cole deMoet
text:
About Me
I am currently studying Business Administration at California Polytechnic State University, Pomona, where I have built skills in data analysis, digital marketing strategy, visualization, and business communication. I enjoy turning complex datasets into clear recommendations that teams can act on.

title: Hi, I’m Cole deMoet

Google Analytics, Excel, SQL, R/Python, A/B testing, KPI reporting

SEO, paid media, customer journey mapping, segmentation, content strategy

title: Marketing Analytics Case Study
text: Analyze campaign performance across marketing channels and recommend actions to improve conversion, efficiency, and revenue.

title: Marketing Analytics Case Study
text:
Objective
Analyze campaign performance across marketing channels and recommend actions to improve conversion, efficiency, and revenue.

title: Marketing Analytics Case Study
text:
Business Question
Which marketing channels are producing the strongest results, and where should the team focus future optimization?

title: Marketing Analytics Case Study
text:
Method

Collected campaign spend, conversion, and revenue data.
Compared channels using conversions, revenue, and return on ad spend.
Identified opportunities for testing and budget reallocation.

title: Marketing Analytics Case Study
text:
Sample Findings



Channel
Strength
Opportunity




Paid Search
Highest revenue
Improve cost efficiency


Email
Strong conversion volume
Personalize by segment


Organic Search
Efficient traffic source
Expand SEO content


Social
Awareness driver
Improve landing page fit

title: Marketing Analytics Case Study
text:
Recommendation 1
Reallocate a portion of low-performing paid budget into channels with stronger return on ad spend.

title: Marketing Analytics Case Study
text:
Recommendation 2
Use A/B testing on landing pages and email subject lines to improve conversion rate.

title: Marketing Analytics Case Study
text:
Recommendation 3
Build a recurring dashboard so stakeholders can track channel performance weekly.

title: Marketing Analytics Case Study
text:
Technical Skills Demonstrated

Quarto website publishing
Revealjs presentation design
Marketing analytics storytelling
KPI interpretation
Dashboard communication

title: Marketing Performance Dashboard
text: Revenue by Channel

title: Marketing Performance Dashboard
text:
Interpretation
Paid Search generated the highest revenue, while Email showed strong efficiency relative to spend. A next step would be to compare channel performance by customer segment and test whether budget should shift toward higher-ROAS channels.

title: Campaign Performance Analysis
text: This project evaluates a sample digital marketing campaign across paid search, email, social, organic search, and referral channels.

title: Campaign Performance Analysis
text: This project evaluates a sample digital marketing campaign across paid search, email, social, organic search, and referral channels.

title: Campaign Performance Analysis
text:
Business Goal
Identify which channels generate the strongest revenue and conversion outcomes, then recommend budget and testing priorities.

title: Campaign Performance Analysis
text:
Methods

Cleaned campaign performance data.
Calculated revenue, conversions, spend, and ROAS.
Visualized channel-level performance.
Converted findings into recommendations.

title: Campaign Performance Analysis
text:
Key Takeaways

Paid Search drove the highest revenue.
Email showed strong efficiency and should be tested further.
Social requires landing page and audience refinement.

title: Campaign Performance Analysis
text:
Tools
Quarto, R, ggplot2, Excel/CSV workflow, marketing KPI framework.

title: Customer Segmentation Case Study

text: This case study demonstrates how customer data can be grouped into meaningful segments for targeting and positioning.

text:

title: Customer Segmentation Case Study
text:
Strategic Value
Segmentation helps marketers prioritize the right audiences, personalize communication, and improve campaign relevance.

title: Strategic Marketing
text: This page showcases work in strategic marketing, campaign planning, brand positioning, and communication strategy. Use this page if your target role emphasizes broader digital marketing or brand strategy in addition to analytics.

title: Strategic Marketing
text:
Project 1: Strategic Campaign Planning
I developed a campaign plan for Dairy Queen, in a social media push specifically for the Dairy Queen located in Rancho Cucamonga.
The Campaign

Created a Tik Tok and Instagram account for the location
Developed ideas for videos and posts to increase engagement and brand awareness.
Oversaw the producation of these videos to ensure quality of material
Uploaded the videos to the accounts and monitored engagement to optimize future content strategy.

title: Strategic Marketing
text:
Project 2: Brand Audit & Positioning
I conducted a campaign for Pi Kappa Alpha Fraternity, developing a social media campaign for their recruitment.
The Campaign

Developed a roadmap for the campaign, including a timeline and key milestones.
Worked with the organization to create content for the campaign, including videos, graphics, and written materials.
Stayed involved throughout the whole process to ensure the quality of the campaign

title: Strategic Marketing
text:
Project 3: Product Launch Go-to-Market Plan
For [new product/service], I created a go-to-market plan including target audience, launch channels, budget allocation, and optimization metrics.
Skills Demonstrated

GTM strategy
Channel mix planning
Customer journey mapping
Launch measurement framework

title: Resume
text:
Machinist/Inspector, Mindrum Precision, Rancho Cucamonga
June 2021 - August 2021

Operated precision machines to produce parts for NASA, the US military, SpaceX, JPL, and other space companies.
Inspected and verified parts to ensure they met strict safety specifications.
Cleaned parts thoroughly to remove metal scraps and ensure quality standards were met.

title: Resume
text:
Manager, Dairy Queen, Rancho Cucamonga
November 2023 - Present

Delegated tasks to team members to optimize workflow and ensure timely order preparation in a fast paced environment.
Managed customer complaints and ensured a high level of customer satisfaction.
Prepared orders and supervised daily operations to ensure efficiency.
